# Equity.AI RAG Platform

Enterprise-grade stock market research, quantitative analysis, and local PDF retrieval engine driven by local LLMs (Qwen2.5 & Nomic-Embed).

## Tech Stack & Architecture

- **Frontend**: Next.js (React), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Lucide Icons. (Runs on port `3000`)
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python), SQLAlchemy, SQLite (`backend/data/stock_rag.db`). (Runs on port `8000`)
- **Vector Database**: Qdrant running in embedded mode at `backend/data/qdrant_storage/`.
- **AI Models**: Remote Ollama server hosting `qwen2.5:14b` for text generation and `nomic-embed-text` for embeddings.

## Core Features

- **RAG Chat**: Semantic hybrid query searches over vectorized PDF annual reports, quarterly filings, and scraped news.
- **Quantitative Screener**: Standard financial ratios filter engine.
- **Modern Portfolio Theory (MPT)**: Efficient Frontier weights optimization.
- **yFinance Sync**: Dynamic metrics updates and historical closure schedules.
- **Admin Console**: Gateway at `/admin` to trigger database purges, scrape commands, and overwrite parameters.

## System Route Map (Frontend Pages)

- [Dashboard](/) - Main commanding landing page. Displays live portfolio Net Worth aggregates, active node status indicators, stock monitored listing tables, and recent news feeds.
- [RAG Chat](/chat) - AI Copilot search console. Submit natural language questions to query PDF reports and crawled news using hybrid retrieval vectors.
- [Analysis Node](/analysis) - Detailed financial metrics view. Pulls real-time quarterly results, revenue growth metrics, capital structures, and visualizes price charts.
- [Compare Node](/compare) - Side-by-side stock analysis. Select two assets to compare profitability, valuations, and moving averages.
- [Screener](/screener) - Multi-metric filter workspace. Custom filters for ROE, debt-to-equity ratios, market cap thresholds, and active volume breakouts.
- [Strategy Backtester](/backtest) - Algorithmic backtest engine to run test runs over historical stock closures.
- [Alert Settings](/alerts) - Threshold alarm manager for setting price thresholds, RSI limits, and sentiment warning indicators.
- [Portfolio Dashboard](/portfolio) - Positions weight allocations manager with integrated Sharpe ratio optimization metrics.
- [Admin Control Console](/admin) - Secure admin dashboard for SQLite rebuilds, RSS feed crawls, parameter overwrites, and audit logs.

## Core API Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/stocks`: List tracked stocks.
- `GET /api/v1/stock/{symbol}`: Retrieve specific stock info, valuation indices, and technical status.
- `POST /api/v1/rag-query`: Submit natural language queries over report contexts.
- `POST /api/v1/screener`: Run filters on assets.
- `GET /api/v1/portfolio/optimize`: Run MPT optimizer on comma-separated tickers.
- `PUT /api/v1/admin/stock/{symbol}/metrics`: Overwrite local parameters.
- `POST /api/v1/admin/actions/rebuild-db`: Purge vector database and rebuild collections.
- `POST /api/v1/admin/actions/scrape-all`: Trigger RSS/Moneycontrol news scrapers.
- `GET /api/v1/audit-logs`: View system operations history logs.

## Setup & Running

1. Copy `backend/.envcopy` to `backend/.env`
2. Create virtual environment in `backend/` and install `requirements.txt`.
3. In `frontend/` run `npm install`.
4. From root folder run `python run_project.py` to start both servers.
